response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and deep exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus proven leadership in open-source and process improvement. His diverse background in embedded, web, and mobile systems demonstrates exceptional adaptability and engineering depth.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker matching core stack perfectly
Proven AI-agent infrastructure work and contributions to agentic workflows (MCP code generators)
Strong DevOps and process discipline with CI/CD, GitLab, Kubernetes, and testing framework expertise
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though Node.js/TypeScript/testing experience is strong
German language skill is only basic, may pose minor collaboration challenges in Berlin-based team
Resume lists many languages/tools but lacks depth indicators for Kotlin/Java beyond past roles
